file_name: Reddy and Santoyo - 2024 - Current landscape of melanoma clinical trials involving artificial intelligence.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of clinical trials on ClinicalTrials.gov and does not use AI to obtain its own results; it summarizes existing studies that utilize AI for melanoma diagnosis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
